button.name: button

timeline.name: timeline
timeline.description: A vertical or horizontal timeline component with animations

gsap-button.description: Professionally animated button with GSAP - hover, click, and entry animations

gsap-card.name: gsap-card
gsap-card.description: 3D tilt card with mouse-following glow and shimmer border effects using GSAP

gsap-input.description: Animated input with gradient border reveal and focus effects using GSAP

gsap-badge.name: gsap-badge

gsap-alert.name: gsap-alert
gsap-alert.description: Animated alert with slide-in, auto-close progress, and exit animations using GSAP

gsap-modal.name: gsap-modal
gsap-modal.description: Professional modal with backdrop fade, scale entry, and staggered content using GSAP

mouse-tracker.name: mouse-tracker

components.description: Full-featured mega menu navbar with animated underline, slide-down panels, and mobile slide-out menu using GSAP
